seoTitle: How to Add an AI Chatbot to Your Wix Website
metaDescription: Learn how to install and configure an AI chatbot on your Wix site to answer FAQs and capture leads around the clock.
intro: Adding an AI chatbot to your Wix site lets you answer common visitor questions and capture leads even when you're not available. This guide covers finding a chatbot app in the Wix App Market, training it on your business FAQs, and styling the widget to match your brand.

steps.heading: Open the App Market
steps.body: From your Wix dashboard, access the native App Market to browse available integrations.

steps.heading: Find and install a chatbot app
steps.body: Search for verified AI chatbot or virtual assistant tools and start the installation process.

steps.heading: Grant the required permissions
steps.body: Approve the workspace data permissions needed for the chatbot to function on your site.

steps.heading: Train it on your FAQs
steps.body: Build out conversation flows and feed the chatbot your common business questions and answers.

steps.heading: Set up lead capture
steps.body: Configure intake fields so the bot can collect contact details from interested visitors.

steps.heading: Style the widget and test
steps.body: Adjust the chat widget's colors and position to match your brand, then preview the conversation flow before going live.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to set up an AI chatbot on Wix?
faq.answer: No, chatbot apps from the Wix App Market are designed for no-code setup through their own configuration panels.

faq.question: Can the chatbot capture leads automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, most chatbot apps let you set up automated lead intake forms as part of the conversation flow.

faq.question: Will the chatbot work on both desktop and mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, but it's worth checking desktop and mobile visibility rules to make sure it doesn't interfere with other layout elements on smaller screens.

faq.question: How do I review what the chatbot is telling customers?
faq.answer: Most chatbot apps provide a transcript log where you can review conversations and check response accuracy.
